lineage.Process: Clip "curva 2500" limite_peru C:\Users\JONATHAN\Documents\ArcGIS\Default.gdb\curva2500_Clip #
CalculateField curva2500_Clip ALTITUD_CURVA 2500 VB #
Erase curva2500 sectores_8_7_20 C:\Users\JONATHAN\Documents\ArcGIS\Default.gdb\curva2500_Erase #
Erase selva_norte_sur sbn C:\Users\JONATHAN\Documents\ArcGIS\Default.gdb\selva_norte_sur_Erase #
Erase selva_norte_sur_Erase snashp C:\Users\JONATHAN\Documents\ArcGIS\Default.gdb\selva_norte_sur_Erase_Erase1 #

Project centrosur C:\Users\JONATHAN\Documents\ArcGIS\Default.gdb\centrosur_Project GEOGCS['GCS_WGS_1984',DATUM['D_WGS_1984',SPHEROID['WGS_1984',6378137.0,298.257223563]],PRIMEM['Greenwich',0.0],UNIT['Degree',0.0174532925199433]] # GEOGCS['GCS_WGS_1984',DATUM['D_WGS_1984',SPHEROID['WGS_1984',6378137.0,298.257223563]],PRIMEM['Greenwich',0.0],UNIT['Degree',0.0174532925199433]] NO_PRESERVE_SHAPE # NO_VERTICAL

attr.attrdef: Length of feature in internal units.
